rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and rest on the same job-relevant findings: lack of substantial recent C++/STL work, no IEC 62443 or MQTT/industrial protocol exposure, and a web-focused TypeScript/Node.js stack rather than embedded/high-performance systems. The wording differs (e.g., 'last 9+ years', 'cloud-native', 'testing, CI/CD, and agile' vs. 'mentoring through workshops') but these are paraphrases and ordinary run-to-run variation, not new penalties tied to the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez. No reasoning keys off the demographic signal.
